kennelTipLean.note: Manly sit 3rd, we're 12th and just scraped past the Eels by 2 with no Critta. Most of the Kennel is bracing for a beating but a few reckon we're due for a smash-and-grab.

kennelTipQuotes.quote: If we can't beat a team with Volkman and Joash in the halves then we should disband — PerthDog laying down the bar before we then went on to win by 2

trivia.question: Which Bulldogs prop won the Dally M Prop of the Year in 2022?
trivia.explainer: Luke Thompson took out the 2022 Dally M Prop of the Year while playing for the Bulldogs — one of the few bright spots in a brutal season.

recap.question: Who scored the Dogs' first try against the Eels?
recap.explainer: Sitili crossed in the 47th to open the scoring, Critta backed it up three minutes later.

washup.headline: Ugly, scratchy, and we'll take it.
washup.vibe: 14-12 over the Eels isn't the kind of win you frame, but Sitili and Critta got the job done in a six-minute window and the defence held on. 54 missed tackles from Parra tells you it was that kind of game. Still 12th, still miles off a finals spot, but at least we're not adding to the embarrassment file.
washup.kennelSummary: The win didn't fix the mood — Critta's shoulder reinjury immediately became the story, with half the board hoping he gets shut down for the year and the other half furious about a Crawley article. Tracey's 286 metres split the room, and the Preston contract saga is getting louder by the day.

kennelHotTakes.quote: Critta injured AGAIN — shut him down for the year, he'll just come back for Origin 2 anyway. Painful to watch.
kennelHotTakes.author: SARGE

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Conti time ?
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: The 'blood Conti' brigade is back at it — push Galvin to 6, give Conti the 7 jumper, shove Burton to lock. Most reckon do it against the Titans next, not Manly this week.

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Can’t afford Preston?
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: Reports Preston and the club are miles apart on a new deal. Gus is getting absolutely roasted for lowballing our best player while throwing 550k at Tracey.

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Freddy Lussick signs for 2 years (2027)
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: Lussick locked in for 2 more years and the rumour mill spinning hard about a second hooker signing — Issa87 hinting it's someone from a top side currently in first grade.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Round 14 Canterbury Bankstown vs Scummy Eels - Monday 8th June 4:05pm - Accor Stadium, Sydney
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Pre-game was full doom — SARGE called it Eels 26 Dogs 10, JayBee said Galvin can get stuffed and go play Flegg. Post-game it pivoted hard into 'we won without Critta, what does that mean?'

10.question: Salmon's named at 13 — does he start the game at lock?

options.label: No, Burton shifts to lock and Salmon goes bench
No, late change — Salmon out of the 17

10.question: Which edge do the Dogs target most in the first 20 minutes?

options.label: Through the middle — Galvin/Burton kicking game

11.question: Tracey's named at 1 — does he last the full 80 or get yanked early?

options.label: Shifted off fullback mid-game (Crichton or Burton goes back)

11.question: Where does the Dogs' first try come from?

options.label: Burton or Galvin set play / kick
Forward crash off a Hayward dart
Outside back off a broken-field scramble

12.question: Salmon's named at 13 — does he hold the lock spot for the full 80?
12.kennel: The 'why we've regressed' thread has half the Kennel screaming that Salmon at 13 is killing our attack.

options.label: Gets hooked early, Mann finishes at 13
Shifts into the middle, Preston rolls back to lock

12.question: First middle off the bench — who gets the early call against Utoikamanu and King?
12.kennel: Forum's been screaming 'shit middles' all week — bench rotation is going to matter the second the Storm pack rolls forward.

options.label: Jack Underhill gets the early call

13.question: Burton's named at 6 after his Storm masterclass — does he see out the full 80 there, or does Ciro shift him to lock late?
13.kennel: Magic Burton thread is unanimous he's our best 5/8 and only option there

options.label: Shifts to lock in the second half
Gets benched late with the game won

13.question: Who opens the scoring for the Dogs?
13.kennel: Rinakama thread is fizzing after his double v Storm, but Burton's the form player

14.question: Galvin and Burton are named as the halves again — does the pairing last the full 80 or does Ciro shuffle one of them out of the halves during the game?
14.kennel: The 'worst halves combo in 100 years' thread has 98 replies of people wanting one of them moved.

options.label: Both finish the game in the halves (6 and 7)
Burton shifts to lock/forwards at some point
One of them gets hooked or subbed off

14.question: Who opens the scoring for the Dogs against the Eels?
14.kennel: Gameday thread is full of try-scorer predictions, with most punters backing the outside backs against this Eels edge defence.
